raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The CalFresh Fruit and Vegetable EBT Pilot Project made healthy foods more affordable.",
    "As a result of ending the pilot project, CalFresh recipients statewide saw a cut in their benefits.",
    "The pilot project provided $10.5 million in rebates to 93,000 CalFresh households.",
    "The pilot project included participation from over 85 grocery stores and several farmers' markets in California.",
    "Research has shown that the annual health care costs associated with food insecurity totals over $7 billion annually in California.",
    "Nearly a quarter of Californian households experienced food insecurity as of May 2024.",
    "The CalFresh Fruit and Vegetable EBT Pilot Project is reported to be an effective solution to addressing food insecurity.",
    "The loss of additional COVID-19 funding meant that families' monthly CalFresh assistance were reduced by at least $95 and up to $258.",
    "The pilot project has served as a critical source of supplemental benefits for individuals and families."
  ]
}
```
